title: Route optimization work based on malfunction mix and evaluation flags
description:
## Summary
As a score operator, I want optimization workflows to route me toward the right next action, so that I do not waste time optimizing scores that are blocked by missing information, unclear guidelines, or mechanical failures.

Feature: Optimization routing and stop/go decisions
Scenario: Operator reviews an evaluation with mixed failure causes
Given an evaluation with misclassification categories and evaluation-level red flags
When Plexus computes the overall assessment for the evaluation
Then it should indicate whether the next action is score optimization, SME clarification, upstream remediation, or bug investigation
And it should make that recommendation visible in the workflow output

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Story now satisfied by completed decision-routing implementation in plx-3e14e5 and workflow runner outputs (policy + route decision). Closing story as complete.
